steps.title: Write both percent facts
steps.content:
Convert the percent statements.
$$
A=3.75B
$$
$$
A=0.00600C
$$

steps.title: Compare the sample weights
steps.content:
Set the expressions equal and solve for $C$.
$$
3.75B=0.00600C
$$
$$
C=\frac{3.75}{0.00600}B=625B
$$

steps.title: Convert the ratio to a percent
steps.content: If $C$ is $p\%$ of $B$, then $$ C=\frac{p}{100}B $$ Since $C=625B$, compare coefficients. $$ \frac{p}{100}=625 $$ $$ p=62{,}500 $$ The answer is 62500.
